symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature: PR adds a `warnings` column/field to slow log and `information_schema.slow_query` and updates related tests.
failure_signature: N/A (feature/behavior change; no linked flaky signature)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is primarily a feature/behavior change (adding warnings to slow log and slow query table) and updates related tests/snapshots. It does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or root-cause explanation for a deterministic flaky test, so it should not be classified as an ordering-related flakiness fix.
fix_pattern: Add a warnings field/column to slow log/slow_query and update tests; not a targeted flaky stabilization fix.
